data.body:
Goal:
Allow users to approve, always approve, or reject pending approval requests from Foolery instead of only seeing a manual-action explanation.

Verification:
1. Run component/store/API tests covering approve, always approve, reject, manual unsupported, and resolution logging.
2. Run `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, and focused approval tests.

Constraints:
Keep adapter-specific reply logic behind explicit interfaces. Do not silently claim an approval was sent when the originating adapter cannot accept replies.
data.title: Wire Foolery approval actions
